archetype: Automated Digital Forensic Analysis and Chain of Custody Management System for Cybercrime Investigations
description: This system automates the analysis of digital evidence and manages the chain of custody for cybercrime investigations, ensuring the integrity and admissibility of evidence in court. It is used by law enforcement agencies and forensic experts to streamline the investigation process. The system must adhere to strict protocols and standards to ensure the accuracy and reliability of the analysis.
rules: MUST comply with the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) 27042:2015 guidelines for digital forensics
MUST support the analysis of various digital evidence formats, including but not limited to, hard drives, mobile devices, and network logs
MUST maintain a detailed and auditable chain of custody for all digital evidence, including timestamped logs and access controls
MUST integrate with existing law enforcement databases and case management systems
MUST ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of sensitive case data and digital evidence
anti_patterns: DO NOT store digital evidence in an unencrypted format or without proper access controls
DO NOT allow unauthorized personnel to access or modify digital evidence
DO NOT neglect to maintain a detailed and auditable chain of custody for all digital evidence
key_technical_challenges: Developing a scalable and efficient digital evidence processing pipeline that can handle large volumes of data
Implementing a robust and secure chain of custody management system that ensures the integrity and admissibility of evidence
Integrating with various law enforcement databases and case management systems while ensuring data consistency and interoperability

recommended_stack.language: Python - for its extensive libraries and frameworks for digital forensics and data analysis
recommended_stack.framework: Flask - for its lightweight and flexible architecture, ideal for building scalable web applications
recommended_stack.database_engine: PostgreSQL - for its robust support for large datasets and advanced data analysis capabilities
recommended_stack.cache: Redis - for its high-performance caching capabilities and ease of integration with the Flask framework
recommended_stack.message_broker: RabbitMQ - for its reliable and scalable message queuing capabilities, ideal for integrating with law enforcement databases and case management systems
